mapper.select: SELECT * FROM colonelsettlement_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonelsettlement_order ( id, order_id, product_id, product_name, shop_id, shop_name, order_amount, actual_amount, settle_colonel_commission, settle_colonel_tech_service_fee, settle_second_colonel_commission, order_status, pick_source, channel_user_id, channel_user_name, channel_dept_id, user_id, dept_id, colonel_user_id, colonel_user_name, promotion_link_id, product_title, colonel_activity_id, settle_time, attribution_status, attribution_remark, create_time, update_time, deleted, extra_data ) SELECT #{id}, #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{shopId}, #{shopName}, #{orderAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{settleColonelCommission}, #{settleColonelTechServiceFee}, #{settleSecondColonelCommission}, #{orderStatus}, #{pickSource}, #{channelUserId}, #{channelUserName}, #{channelDeptId}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{colonelUserId}, #{colonelUserName}, #{promotionLinkId}, #{productTitle}, #{activityId}, #{settleTime}, #{attributionStatus}, #{attributionRemark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, CAST(#{extraData, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS JSONB) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM colonelsettlement_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} )
